spec_match.rationale: Accurately represents the core specifications of CHIPS, including the strict requirement that Partitioned cookies also carry SameSite=None and Secure attributes.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding interactivity. Implements panel step tab navigation and a live cookie builder containing 4 binary toggle switches that dynamically build headers and emit real-time specification diagnostic notes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned perfectly with the parent index: walks through the 4-step explainer and provides the interactive header builder with verification indicators.

edge_cases.rationale: Dynamically asserts cookie specification constraints (e.g. warning if Partitioned is set but Secure or SameSite=None are missing).

references.rationale: The see-also section now links to the required ChromeStatus entry plus partitioned-cookie migration references.

design_system.rationale: Conforms beautifully to all styling conventions, utilizing monospace fonts, pill tags, custom code containers, and card layouts.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: A highly compliant conceptual sandbox introducing CHIPS cookie design. It includes rich tab navigation, a dynamic header builder, and the required ChromeStatus plus CHIPS migration references.
